# sample-robots.txt — test fixture covering UA-specific rules, wildcards, and $ anchors.

User-agent: *
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /private/
Allow: /private/public-doc.html
Disallow: /tmp/
Allow: /tmp/shared/

User-agent: apifier
Allow: /api/
Allow: /api/v2/
Disallow: /api/internal/
Allow: /static/*.css
Disallow: /static/
Disallow: /downloads/
Allow: /downloads/free/
Disallow: /locked$

User-agent: badbot
Disallow: /
